text: The operator uses a sketch pen to draw a line on the surface of a grape. Using the Darwin C robotic system, the grape is stabilized with a micro needle holder while micro scissors articulate to cut along the marked line.

The Da Vinci robotic system is used to precisely cut the skin of a grape with micro scissors, while a micro needle holder stabilizes the grape. The skin is completely removed after the precise cutting is finished.
Two micro-dental holders are used; one stabilizes the grape while the other peels off the skin smoothly, demonstrating precise control.
